title: Starbound
description: A mod focused on adding new starry items and blocks.
body:
# Starbound
A mod focused on adding new starry items and blocks, aswell as weaponry.
## Features
- Starry Gel
> A new block found in the outer end islands that makes entities translucent aswell as allows them to move freely inside without gravity. 
The item can be used to make other items emissive aswell as transform stones into starstone, a new building block that shines bright at night.
- Starry Totem
> A new Totem variant, that saves you from the void and applies the Translucent Effect from the Starry Gel. Comes at the cost of less regeneration and no fire resistance.
- Astral Spyglass
> A new Spyglass variant, that gives you night vision when looked through and allows you to see translucent mobs more clearly.
- Starry Goliath
> A big cleaver made out of Starry Ingots, that has slightly more reach than the average axe, at the cost of attack damage and speed.
> When used, summons shields around the user that each reduce damage taken by 15%. Alternatively, when used with the Flail enchant, summons shards that damage nearby entities.

## SUGGESTIONS / ISSUES
Have something to suggest or found a bug? Either [join our Discord](https://discord.gg/Dmp2dbyNrs) or [make an issue in our GitHub](https://github.com/Now-this-is-crazy/Starbound/issues).
